title: Gaycraft
description: A gay modpack with an even gayer questline!
body:
![Gaycraft title image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99602d1269ff51e3ce00ed8c51f5aee04ec3f767.png)
**<center>Welcome to GAYCRAFT!</center>**
<center>A custom modpack for the Sablekyu community on twitch, or anyone who likes their modpacks a little bit... Gay!</center>
<center>Gaycraft is dedicated to my wonderful twitch community AKA Gremlins 💫 </center>
<hr>

**_Features of Gaycraft:_**
- Fully custom questline for progression, challenges, and collection!
- Handpicked mods focused on building, aesthetic, exploration and farming
- An array of pride themed mods and resource packs for the peak GayTM experience
- 'Skill Tree' to try your hand at harder advancements for each skill

> Gaycraft is made to be both _easy_ for those who want it to be easy, but a _challenge_ for those who want a challenge. There is a ton of QOL features, aimed to make your experience less _grindy_ and more enjoyable especially to focus on building, collecting and quests. _CHALLENGE_ quests let you try something a little harder instead!
> 
> This modpack is **light on biome and worldgen mods**, **zero tech or magic mods**, **emphasis on aesthetic and ambience**, and **heavy on building and decoration mods**! 

## **<center>[TWITCH](https://www.twitch.tv/sablekyu) | [YOUTUBE](https://www.youtube.com/@sablekyu) | [KOFI](https://ko-fi.com/sablekyu)</center>**


![Gaycraft Quest Intro screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec014312bea88bd96c1260cb0f797e53ec917180.png)

### **IMPORTANT**: _Please note the Discord server is used for Sablekyu's twitch community, **not solely the Gaycraft modpack** for now!_
###
